overall.description: A cinematic third-person perspective from a video game (Final Fantasy VII Remake) showing a protagonist walking through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street at night. The scene features industrial overpasses, neon signage, and reflective wet asphalt beneath a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial city street beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: protagonist walking steadily down the wet street toward the industrial overpass ahead

entered.detail: massive steel girder structure spanning the street overhead with support beams
large red metal container barrier along the left sidewalk
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents
tall street light with multiple lamps illuminating the wet pavement
industrial building wall with metal panels and warning signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city street at night beneath a massive industrial overpass. The camera follows the protagonist walking forward as neon lights from distant buildings reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt. A red shipping container sits on the left sidewalk while street lamps cast pools of light on the ground.

events.description: passing directly beneath the industrial overpass structure as the halloween billboard becomes prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward beneath the overpass, approaching the illuminated billboard and commercial signs ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement featuring a skull and Halloween promotional text
building facade covered in bright neon signs and digital displays
tall structure with multiple stacked digital screens showing advertisements
modern high-rise building with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: Moving beneath the massive overpass structure, the scene reveals a large Halloween-themed billboard ahead. The camera continues forward as the red container falls behind, and various neon signs and digital advertisements on the right side become visible. The street remains empty as the protagonist approaches the commercial intersection.

events.description: camera begins slight left turn while maintaining forward momentum toward the street-level shops

agents.ego_description: walking forward while gradually turning left toward the commercial buildings and street-level shops ahead

entered.detail: enclosed walkway bridge connecting buildings across the street above
ground-level storefronts with illuminated signage and entranceways
row of commercial establishments at street level with bright lighting
vertical traffic signal pole with illuminated lights

segments.scene_description: Approaching the commercial district, the camera turns slightly left while passing beneath a pedestrian overpass bridge. The Halloween billboard shifts to the right as street-level shops and storefronts come into view ahead. The industrial overpass structure moves to the left side of the frame while the protagonist continues toward the illuminated commercial buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked industrial zone that gradually transitions into a brightly lit commercial district. It begins on a wet city street beneath a massive industrial overpass, following the protagonist as neon lights reflect off the asphalt and a red shipping container sits on the left sidewalk. As the camera moves further under the overpass structure, the red container falls behind and the view opens up to reveal a large Halloween-themed billboard and various digital advertisements. The scene then shifts as the camera turns slightly left to pass beneath a pedestrian bridge, moving the industrial overpass to the side of the frame. Finally, the environment expands into a commercial intersection where the Halloween billboard recedes to the right and illuminated storefronts come into full view ahead.
